1. Execute steps 1 to 7 of the Base Class Pattern *constructor*. 1. Let _onReadable_ be a function with the following steps:: 1. Let _data_ be Call(GetProperty(*this*, *"read"*), *this*). 1. Let _provider_ be GetProperty(*this*, *"target"*). 1. Dispatch _data_ among IO objects of _provider_. 1. Let _count_ be the number of supported IO connection. 1. Let _onWritable_ be a function with the following steps:: 1. Let _count_ be _count_ - 1. 1. If _count_ is 0, then 1. Let _provider_ be GetProperty(*this*, *"target"*). 1. Configure _provider_ with _params_. 1. Add supported IO constructors to _provider_. 1. SetInternalField(_provider_, *"status"*, *"ready"*). 1. Let _callback_ be GetInternalField(_provider_, *"onReady"*). 1. If _callback_ is not *null*, then 1. Call(_callback_, _provider_). 1. Let _onError_ be a function with the following steps:: 1. Let _provider_ be GetProperty(*this*, *"target"*). 1. Dispatch the error to open IO objects of _provider_. 1. Call(GetProperty(_provider_, *"close"*), _provider_). 1. Let _callback_ be GetInternalField(_provider_, *"onError"*). 1. If _callback_ is not *null*, then 1. Call(_callback_, _provider_). 1. Try: 1. For each supported IO connection, do 1. Let _name_ be the name of the supported IO connection. 1. Let _ioOptions_ be GetProperty(_params_, _name_). 1. Let _ioParams_ be a copy of _ioOptions_. 1. Let _ioConstructor_ be GetProperty(_ioParams_, *"io"*). 1. DefineProperty(_ioParams_, *"onReadable"*, _onReadable_). 1. DefineProperty(_ioParams_, *"onWritable"*, _onWritable_). 1. DefineProperty(_ioParams_, *"onError"*, _onError_). 1. DefineProperty(_ioParams_, *"target"*, *this*). 1. Let _ioConnection_ be Construct(_ioConstructor_, _ioParams_). 1. SetInternalField(*this*, _name_, _ioConnection_). 1. Catch _exception_: 1. Call(GetProperty(*this*, *"close"*), *this*). 1. Throw _exception_. 1. Execute step 8 of the Base Class Pattern *constructor*.
1. Execute all steps of the Peripheral Class Pattern *close* method.

ul.li: The Flash module default export is an object with an *open* method that creates Flash Partition instances.

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. Let *this* be a new instance of the Flash Partition class. 1. Execute all steps of the IO Class Pattern *constructor*. 1. Return *this*.

ul.li: The *"resources"* internal field of a Flash Partition instance describes the access to a specific region of flash memory. The access is read-only if *mode* is *"r"*.
For a Flash Partition instance, step 4 of the IO Class Pattern *constructor* opens the access to the flash partition specified by *name*.

Let _blocks_ be the number of blocks in _partition_. 1. Convert _from_ into an ECMAScript number. 1. If _to_ is absent, then 1. Let _to_ be _from_ + 1. 1. Else, 1. Convert _to_ into an ECMAScript number. 1. Throw if _from_ < 0 or *from* >= _blocks_. 1. Throw if _to_ <= *from* or *to* > _blocks_. 1. While _from_ < _to_: 1. Erase block _from_ in _partition_. 1. Read _count_ bytes into _pointer_ from _partition_ at _offset_. 1. Return _result_.

The Update module default export is an object with an *open* method that creates Update instances.

Let _size_ be the size of _partition_. 1. Let _byteLength_ be GetProperty(_params_, *"byteLength"*). 1. If _byteLength_ is not *undefined*, then 1. Throw if _byteLength_ > _size_. 1. Let _size_ be _byteLength_. 1. Let _update_ be a new over the air update process for _partition_. 1. Set the mode of _update_ to _mode_. 1. Set the offset of _update_ to *0*. 1. Set the size of _update_ to _size_. 1. Begin _update_ . 1. SetInternalField(this, *"resources"*, _update_). 1. Execute steps 5 to 6 of the IO Class Pattern *constructor*. 1. Return *this*.

The *"resources"* internal field of a Directory instance describes a specific directory in the file system. On POSIX, the internal field is a file descriptor.
All directory and file entries are specified by a path relative to the specific directory described by the Directory instance resources.
Paths are strings. The path separator is *"/"*. CheckPath enforces paths to be beneath the specific directory described by the Directory instance resources.

Let _mode_ be GetProperty(_options_, *"mode"*). 1. Convert _mode_ into an ECMAScript string. 1. Throw if _mode_ is neither *"r"*, nor *"r+"*, nor *"w"*, nor *"w+"*. 1. Let _fd_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. Let _fd2_ be the result of opening the file specified by _path_ relative to _fd_ with _mode_. 1. Let _result_ be a new File instance . 1. SetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*, _fd2_). 1. Return _result_.

ul.li: Step 9 must throw if the entry does not exist and _mode_ is neither *"w"* nor *"w+"*, or if the entry exists but is not a file.
See man openat

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _path_ be CheckPath(_path_). 1. Let _fd_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. Let _result_ be the target of the symbolic link specified by _path_ relative to _fd_ . 1. Return _result_.

ul.li: See man readlinkat

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _constructor_ be the Directory Iterator Class. 1. If _path_ is present, then 1. Let _iterator_ be Construct(_constructor_, *this*, path). 1. Else, 1. Let _iterator_ be Construct(_constructor_, *this*). 1. Return _iterator_.

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _path_ be CheckPath(_path_). 1. Let _resolveTarget_ be *true*. 1. If _options_ is present, then 1. Throw if _options_ is not an object. 1. If HasProperty(_options_, "resolveTarget"), then 1. Let _resolveTarget_ be GetProperty(_options_, *"resolveTarget"*). 1. Convert _resolveTarget_ into an ECMAScript boolean. 1. Let _fd_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. Let _result_ be a new object. 1. If the entry specified by _path_ relative to _fd_ exists, then 1. Let _status_ be the status of the entry specified by _path_ relative to _fd_, following symbolic links if _resolveTarget_ is *true*. 1. Let _size_ be _status_ size. 1. Let _mode_ be _status_ mode. 1. Let _isFile_ be a function that returns *true* if _mode_ is a file. 1. Let _isDirectory_ be a function that returns *true* if _mode_ is a directory. 1. Let _isSymbolicLink_ be a function that returns *true* if _mode_ is a symbolic link. 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"size"*, _size_). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"mode"*, _mode_). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"isFile"*, _isFile_). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"isDirectory"*, _isDirectory_). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"isSymbolicLink"*, _isSymbolicLink_). 1. Else, 1. Let _isNone_ be a function that returns *false*. 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"size"*, *0*). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"mode"*, *0*). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"isFile"*, _isNone_). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"isDirectory"*, _isNone_). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"isSymbolicLink"*, _isNone_). 1. Return _result_.

ul.li: See man fstatat

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. Return Call(GetProperty(*this*, *"scan"*), *this*).

1. Throw if _directory_ is not a Directory instance. 1. Let _fd_ be GetInternalField(*directory*, *"resources"*). 1. If _path_ is present, then 1. Let _path_ be CheckPath(_path_). 1. Let _fd2_ be the result of opening the directory specified by _path_ relative to _fd_. 1. Else, 1. Let _fd2_ be the result of duplicating _fd_. 1. Let _stream_ be the result of opening a directory stream corresponding to _fd2_. 1. SetInternalField(*this*, *"stream"*, _stream_).

ul.li: See man dup and man fdopendir

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. Let _stream_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"stream"*). 1. If _stream_ is *null*, then 1. Let _entry_ be *null*. 1. Else, 1. Let _entry_ be the next directory entry in _stream_. 1. If _entry_ is *null*, then 1. Close _stream_. 1. SetInternalField(*this*, *"stream"*, *null*). 1. Else, 1. Let _name_ be the name of _entry_. 1. If _name_ is *"."* or *".."* go to step 3.1. 1. Let _result_ be Construct(GetProperty(*globalThis*, *"Object"*)). 1. If _entry_ is *null*, then 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"done"*, *true*). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"value"*, *undefined*). 1. Else, 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"done"*, *false*). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"value"*, _name_). 1. Return _result_.

ul.li: See man readdir

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. Let _stream_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"stream"*). 1. If _stream_ is not *null*, then 1. Close _stream_. 1. SetInternalField(*this*, *"stream"*, *null*). 1. Let _result_ be Construct(GetProperty(*globalThis*, *"Object"*)). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"done"*, *true*). 1. SetProperty(_result_, *"value"*, *undefined*). 1. Return _result_.

ul.li: Closing the iterator stream must also close the resources used to open the iterator stream.
See man closedir
The File module default export is a Directory instance, which is used to access file and directory entries in the file system.
On POSIX, it is typically the *$HOME* directory.

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. Execute all steps of the IO Class Pattern constructor.
1. Execute all steps of the IO Class Pattern close method.

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. Let _queue_ be _resources_ advertisement packet queue. 1. If _queue_ is empty, then 1. Return *undefined*. 1. Dequeue the oldest advertisement packet into _packet_. 1. Let _advertisement_ be a new instance of the GAPClientAdvertisement Class. 1. SetInternalField(_advertisement_, `"resources"`, _packet_). 1. Let _address_ be _packet_ address as an an ECMAScript string. 1. DefineProperty(_advertisement_, `"address"`, _address_). 1. If _packet_ RSSI is present, then 1. Let _rssi_ be _packet_ RSSI as an an ECMAScript number. 1. DefineProperty(_advertisement_, `"rssi"`, _rssi_). 1. Return _advertisement_.
1. Throw.

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _packet_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. Convert _adType_ into an ECMAScript number. 1. Throw if _adType_ is no 8-bit unsigned integer. 1. Let _adData_ be _packet_ data for _adType_. 1. If _adData_ is absent, then 1. Return *undefined*. 1. Let _n_ be the byte length of _adData_. 1. [declared="ArrayBuffer"] Let _result_ be Construct(_ArrayBuffer_, _n_). 1. Let _pointer_ be GetBytePointer(_result_). 1. Copy _n_ bytes from _adData_ into _pointer_. 1. Return _result_.

1. Let _result_ be Call(GetProperty(*this*, *"get"*), *this*, *9*). 1. If _result_ is *undefined*, then 1. Let _result_ be Call(GetProperty(*this*, *"get"*), *this*, *8*). 1. If _result_ is *undefined*, then 1. Return *""*. 1. Convert _result_ into an ECMAScript string. 1. Return _result_.

1. Let _result_ be a new array. 1. Let _pushUUIDs_ be a new Abstract Closure with parameters (_id_, _n_) that captures _result_ and performs the following steps when called: 1. Let _uuids_ be Call(GetProperty(*this*, *"get"*), *this*, _id_). 1. If _uuids_ is *undefined*, then 1. Let _uuids_ be Call(GetProperty(*this*, *"get"*), *this*, _id_ *-* *1*). 1. If _uuids_ is not *undefined*, then 1. Let _size_ be GetProperty(_uuids_, *"byteLength"*). 1. Let _offset_ be *0*. 1. While _offset_ is less than _size_: 1. [declared="DataView"] Let _uuid_ be Construct(_DataView_, _uuids_, _offset_, _n_). 1. Let _uuid_ be UUIDBufferToString(_uuid_). 1. Add _uuid_ to _result_. 1. Let _offset_ be _offset_ + _n_. 1. _pushUUIDs_(*3*, *2*). 1. _pushUUIDs_(*5*, *4*). 1. _pushUUIDs_(*7*, *16*). 1. Let _n_ be the length of _result_. 1. If _n_ is more than *0*, then 1. Return _result_.

1. Let _data_ be Call(GetProperty(*this*, *"get"*), *this*, *255*). 1. If _data_ is *undefined*, then 1. Return *undefined*. 1. Let _n_ be GetProperty(_data_, *"byteLength"*). 1. If _n_ is less than *2*, then 1. Return *undefined*. 1. [declared="Uint8Array"] Let _data_ be Construct(_Uint8Array_, _data_). 1. Let _manufacturer_ be GetProperty(_data_, *0*) *|* GetProperty(_data_, *1*) *<<* *8*. 1. Let _data_ be Call(GetProperty(_data_, *"slice"*), _data_, *2*). 1. Let _data_ be GetProperty(_data_, *"buffer"*). 1. Let _result_ be a new object. 1. DefineProperty(_result_, *"manufacturer"*, _manufacturer_). 1. DefineProperty(_result_, *"data"*, _data_). 1. Return _result_.

1. Execute all steps of the IO Class Pattern – asynchronous close method.

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. If _filters_ is present, then 1. Throw if _filters_ is not an array. 1. Let _list_ be an empty list of UUID. 1. For each element _uuid_ of _filters_, do 1. Let _uuid_ be UUIDStringToBuffer(_uuid_). 1. Append _uuid_ to _list_. 1. Discover services of _resources_ that match UUIDs of _list_. 1. Else, 1. Discover all services of _resources_. 1. When the operation completes: 1. Queue a task that performs: 1. If the operation failed, then 1. Let _error_ be an ECMAScript *Error* object describing the failure. 1. Let _result_ be *null*. 1. Else, 1. Let _error_ be *null*. 1. Let _result_ be a new array. 1. For each discovered service, do 1. Let _service_ be a new instance of the GATTClientService Class. 1. Let _resources_ be the discovered service. 1. SetInternalField(_service_, `"resources"`, _resources_). 1. Add _service_ to _result_. 1. Call(_callback_, *this*, _error_, _result_).

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. CheckInternalFields(_service_). 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(_service_, *"resources"*). 1. If _filters_ is present, then 1. Throw if _filters_ is not an array. 1. Let _list_ be an empty list of UUID. 1. For each element _uuid_ of _filters_, do 1. Let _uuid_ be UUIDStringToBuffer(_uuid_). 1. Append _uuid_ to _list_. 1. Discover characteristics of _resources_ that match UUIDs of _list_. 1. Else, 1. Discover all characteristics of _resources_. 1. When the operation completes: 1. Queue a task that performs: 1. If the operation failed, then 1. Let _error_ be an ECMAScript *Error* object describing the failure. 1. Let _result_ be *null*. 1. Else, 1. Let _error_ be *null*. 1. Let _result_ be a new array. 1. For each discovered characteristic, do 1. Let _characteristic_ be a new instance of the GATTClientCharacteristic Class. 1. Let _resources_ be the discovered characteristic. 1. SetInternalField(_characteristic_, `"resources"`, _resources_). 1. Add _characteristics_ to _result_. 1. Call(_callback_, *this*, _error_, _result_).

Throw if _filters_ is not an array. 1. Let _list_ be an empty list of UUID. 1. For each element _uuid_ of _filters_, do 1. Let _uuid_ be UUIDStringToBuffer(_uuid_). 1. Append _uuid_ to _list_. 1. Discover descriptors of _resources_ that match UUIDs of _list_. 1. Else, 1. Discover all descriptors of _resources_. 1. When the operation completes: 1. Queue a task that performs: 1. If the operation failed, then 1. Let _error_ be an ECMAScript *Error* object describing the failure. 1. Let _result_ be *null*. 1. Else, 1. Let _error_ be *null*. 1. Let _result_ be a new array. 1. For each discovered descriptor, do 1. Let _descriptor_ be a new instance of the GATTClientDescriptor Class. 1. Let _resources_ be the discovered descriptor. 1. SetInternalField(_descriptor_, `"resources"`, _resources_). 1. Add _descriptor_ to _result_. 1. Call(_callback_, *this*, _error_, _result_).

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. If _what_ is present, then 1. If _what_ is an instance of the GATTClientCharacteristic Class, then 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(_what_, *"resources"*). 1. Else if _what_ is an instance of the GATTClientDescriptor Class, then 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(_what_, *"resources"*). 1. Else, 1. Throw. 1. Read _resources_ value. 1. When the operation completes: 1. Queue a task that performs: 1. If the operation failed, then 1. Let _error_ be an ECMAScript *Error* object describing the failure. 1. Let _result_ be *null*. 1. Else, 1. Let _error_ be *null*. 1. Let _n_ be the byte length of _resources_ value. 1. [declared="ArrayBuffer"] Let _result_ be Construct(_ArrayBuffer_, _n_). 1. Let _pointer_ be GetBytePointer(_result_). 1. Copy _n_ bytes from _resources_ value into _pointer_. 1. Call(_callback_, *this*, _error_, _result_). 1. Else, 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. Let _queue_ be _resources_ notification queue. 1. If _queue_ is empty, then 1. Return *undefined*. 1. Dequeue the oldest notification into _notification_. 1. Let _n_ be the byte length of _notification_ value. 1. [declared="ArrayBuffer"] Let _result_ be Construct(_ArrayBuffer_, _n_). 1. Let _pointer_ be GetBytePointer(_result_). 1. Copy _n_ bytes from _notification_ value into _pointer_. 1. Let _handle_ be _notification_ handle as an ECMAScript number or string. 1. SetProperty(_result_, `"handle"`, _handle_). 1. Return _result_.

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. If _what_ is an instance of the GATTClientCharacteristic Class, then 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(_what_, *"resources"*). 1. Let _response_ be *true*. 1. If _options_ is present, then 1. If HasProperty(_options_, *"response"*), then 1. Let _response_ be GetProperty(_options_, *"response"*). 1. Convert _response_ into an ECMAScript boolean. 1. Else if _what_ is an instance of the GATTClientDescriptor Class, then 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(_what_, *"resources"*). 1. Let _response_ be *false*. 1. Else, 1. Throw. 1. If _value_ is not a readable byte buffer, then 1. Throw. 1. Write _resources_ value with _value_ and _response_. 1. When the operation completes: 1. Queue a task that performs: 1. If the operation failed, then 1. Let _error_ be an ECMAScript *Error* object describing the failure. 1. Else, 1. Let _error_ be *null*. 1. Call(_callback_, *this*, _error_).

When the operation completes: 1. If _callback_ is present, then 1. Queue a task that performs: 1. If the operation failed, then 1. Let _error_ be an ECMAScript *Error* object describing the failure. 1. Else, 1. Let _error_ be *null*. 1. Call(_callback_, *this*, _error_).

When the operation completes: 1. If _callback_ is present, then 1. Queue a task that performs: 1. If the operation failed, then 1. Let _error_ be an ECMAScript *Error* object describing the failure. 1. Else, 1. Let _error_ be *null*. 1. Call(_callback_, *this*, _error_).

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. If _action_ is *"input"*, then 1. If _data_ is present, then 1. Convert _data_ into an ECMAScript number. 1. Else, 1. Let _data_ be *0*. 1. Else if _action_ is *"compareNumber"*, then 1. Convert _data_ into an ECMAScript boolean. 1. Else if _action_ is *"outOfBand"*, then 1. If _data_ is not a readable byte buffer, then 1. Throw. 1. Let _n_ be the byte length of _data_. 1. If _n_ is not *16*, then 1. Throw. 1. Else, 1. Throw. 1. Reply to passkey with _action_ and _data_.

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. If _what_ is an instance of the GATTClientService Class, then 1. Let _n_ be the GATTClientService record size. 1. Let _tag_ be the GATTClientService record tag. 1. Else if _what_ is an instance of the GATTClientCharacteristic Class, then 1. Let _n_ be the GATTClientCharacteristic record size. 1. Let _tag_ be the GATTClientCharacteristic record tag. 1. Else if _what_ is an instance of the GATTClientDescriptor Class, then 1. Let _n_ be the GATTClientDescriptor record size. 1. Let _tag_ be the GATTClientDescriptor record tag. 1. Else, 1. Throw. 1. [declared="ArrayBuffer"] Let _result_ be Construct(_ArrayBuffer_, _n_). 1. Serialize _tag_ into _result_. 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(_what_, *"resources"*). 1. Serializes _resources_ into _result_. 1. Return _result_.

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. If _buffer_ is not a readable byte buffer, then 1. Throw. 1. Let _n_ be the byte length of _buffer_. 1. If _n_ is less than the size of a record tag, then 1. Throw. 1. Deserialize _tag_ from _buffer_. 1. If _tag_ is the GATTClientService record tag, then 1. If _n_ is less than the GATTClientService record size, then 1. Throw. 1. Let _result_ be a new instance of the GATTClientService Class. 1. Else if _tag_ is the GATTClientCharacteristic record tag, then 1. If _n_ is less than the GATTClientCharacteristic record size, then 1. Throw. 1. Let _result_ be a new instance of the GATTClientCharacteristic Class. 1. Else if _tag_ is the GATTClientDescriptor record tag, then 1. If _n_ is less than the GATTClientDescriptor record size, then 1. Throw. 1. Let _result_ be a new instance of the GATTClientDescriptor Class. 1. Else, 1. Throw. 1. Deserialize _resources_ from _buffer_. 1. SetInternalField(_result_, `"resources"`, _resources_). 1. Return _result_.

1. Throw.

1. Execute all steps of the IO Class Pattern constructor. 1. Let _services_ be a new array. 1. SetInternalField(*this*, *"services"*, _services_). 1. Let _serviceRecords_ be GetProperty(_params_, *"services"*). 1. If _serviceRecords_ is not *null*, then 1. For each element _serviceRecord_ of _serviceRecords_, do 1. Let _service_ be CreateGATTService(_serviceRecord_). 1. Add _service_ to _services_. 1. Let _connections_ be a new array. 1. SetInternalField(*this*, *"connections"*, _connections_).
emu-annex.emu-note: The internal hierarchy of services, characteristics, and descriptors is specified here with arrays and objects. But only characteristic and descriptor objects corresponding to variable characteristics and descriptors are observable, thru their callbacks. The rest of the hierarchy can be implemented without arrays and objects. However, observable objects in the hierarchy cannot be garbage collected until their server is closed.

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. Let _connections_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"connections"*). 1. If _connections_ is not *null*, then 1. For each element _connection_ of _connections_, do 1. Call(GetProperty(_connection_, *"close"*), _connection_). 1. Let _services_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"services"*). 1. If _services_ is not *null*, then 1. For each element _service_ of _services_, do 1. DeleteGATTService(_service_). 1. Execute all steps of the IO Class Pattern *close* method.
1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _services_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"services"*). 1. Let _service_ be CreateGATTService(_serviceRecord_). 1. Add _service_ to _services_.
1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _services_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"services"*). 1. Remove *this* from _services_. 1. DeleteGATTService(*this*).

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _broadcast_ be ConvertGATTAdvertisement(_broadcast_). 1. If _scanResponse_ is present, then 1. Let _scanResponse_ be ConvertGATTAdvertisement(_scanResponse_). 1. Else, 1. Let _scanResponse_ be *undefined*. 1. Start advertising _broadcast_ and _scanResponse_.
1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Stop advertising.

emu-annex.p: An object with the following properties:
The algorithms also use the following constants:

dl.dd: It returns a service object (an instance of the GATTServerService Class).

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. Throw if _serviceRecord_ is not an object. 1. Let _uuid_ be GetProperty(_serviceRecord_, *"uuid"*). 1. Let _uuid_ be UUIDStringToBuffer(_uuid_). 1. Let _service_ be a new instance of the GATTServerService Class. 1. Let _resources_ be a new peripheral service specified by _uuid_. 1. SetInternalField(_service_, *"resources"*, _resources_). 1. If HasProperty(_serviceRecord_, *"characteristics"*), then 1. Let _characteristicRecords_ be GetProperty(_serviceRecord_, *"characteristics"*). 1. Throw if _characteristicRecords_ is not an array. 1. Let _characteristics_ be a new array. 1. For each element _characteristicRecord_ of _characteristicRecords_, do 1. Let _characteristic_ be CreateGATTCharacteristic(_characteristicRecord_). 1. Add _characteristic_ to _characteristics_. 1. Else, 1. Let _characteristics_ be *null*. 1. SetInternalField(_service_, *"characteristics"*, _characteristics_). 1. Return _service_.

1. Let _characteristics_ be GetInternalField(_service_, *"characteristics"*). 1. If _characteristics_ is not *null*, then 1. For each element _characteristic_ of _characteristics_, do 1. DeleteGATTCharacteristic(_characteristic_). 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(_service_, *"resources"*). 1. If _resources_ is not *null*, then 1. Free _resources_. 1. ClearInternalFields(_service_).

tr.td: number, a logical OR of GATTServer properties

dl.dd: It returns a characteristic object (an instance of the GATTServerCharacteristic Class).

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. Throw if _characteristicRecord_ is not an object. 1. Let _uuid_ be GetProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"uuid"*). 1. Let _uuid_ be UUIDStringToBuffer(_uuid_). 1. Let _properties_ be GetProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"properties"*). 1. Convert _properties_ into an ECMAScript number. 1. Throw if _properties_ is not a positive integer. 1. If HasProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"onRead"*), then 1. Let _onRead_ be GetProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"onRead"*). 1. Throw if not IsCallable(_onRead_). 1. Else, 1. Let _onRead_ be *null*. 1. If HasProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"onWrite"*), then 1. Let _onWrite_ be GetProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"onWrite"*). 1. Throw if not IsCallable(_onWrite_). 1. Else, 1. Let _onWrite_ be *null*. 1. If HasProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"onSubscribe"*), then 1. Let _onSubscribe_ be GetProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"onSubscribe"*). 1. Throw if not IsCallable(_onSubscribe_). 1. Else, 1. Let _onSubscribe_ be *null*. 1. If HasProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"onUnsubscribe"*), then 1. Let _onUnsubscribe_ be GetProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"onUnsubscribe"*). 1. Throw if not IsCallable(_onUnsubscribe_). 1. Else, 1. Let _onUnsubscribe_ be *null*. 1. Let _characteristic_ be a new instance of the GATTServerCharacteristic Class. 1. If HasProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"value"*), then 1. Throw if some of _onRead_, _onWrite_, _onSubscribe_, _onUnsubscribe_ are not *null*. 1. Let _value_ be GetProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"value"*). 1. Throw if _value_ is not a readable byte buffer. 1. Let _n_ be GetProperty(_value_, *"byteLength"*). 1. NOTE: When a connection is established, report a warning if _n_ is bigger than the connection maximumWrite. 1. Let _resources_ be a new constant peripheral service characteristic specified by _uuid_, _properties_ and _value_. 1. Else, 1. If _properties_ *&* READABLE is *0*, then 1. Throw if _onRead_ is not *null*. 1. Else, 1. Throw if _onRead_ is *null*. 1. If _properties_ *&* WRITABLE is *0*, then 1. Throw if _onWrite_ is not *null*. 1. Else, 1. Throw if _onWrite_ is *null*. 1. If _properties_ *&* NOTIFIABLE is *0*, then 1. Throw if _onSubscribe_ is not *null*. 1. Else, 1. Throw if _onSubscribe_ is *null*. 1. NOTE: _characteristic_ is the *this* value when calling _onRead_, _onWrite_, _onSubscribe_, _onUnsubscribe_. 1. SetInternalField(_characteristic_, `"onRead"`, _onRead_). 1. SetInternalField(_characteristic_, `"onWrite"`, _onWrite_). 1. SetInternalField(_characteristic_, `"onSubscribe"`, _onSubscribe_). 1. SetInternalField(_characteristic_, `"onUnsubscribe"`, _onUnsubscribe_). 1. Let _resources_ be a new variable peripheral service characteristic specified by _uuid_, _properties_, and a reference to _characteristic_. 1. SetInternalField(_characteristic_, `"resources"`, _resources_). 1. If HasProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"descriptors"*), then 1. Let _descriptorRecords_ be GetProperty(_characteristicRecord_, *"descriptors"*). 1. Throw if _descriptorRecords_ is not an array. 1. Let _descriptors_ be a new array. 1. For each element _descriptorRecord_ of _descriptorRecords_, do 1. Let _descriptor_ be CreateGATTDescriptor(_descriptorRecord_). 1. Add _descriptor_ to _descriptors_. 1. Else, 1. Let _descriptors_ be *null*. 1. SetInternalField(_characteristic_, `"descriptors"`, _descriptors_). 1. Return _characteristic_.

1. Let _descriptors_ be GetInternalField(_characteristic_, *"descriptors"*). 1. If _descriptors_ is not *null*, then 1. For each element _descriptor_ of _descriptors_, do 1. DeleteGATTDescriptor(_descriptor_). 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(_characteristic_, *"resources"*). 1. If _resources_ is not *null*, then 1. Free _resources_. 1. ClearInternalFields(_characteristic_).

dl.dd: It returns a descriptor object (an instance of the GATTServerDescriptor Class).

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. Throw if _descriptorRecord_ is not an object. 1. Let _uuid_ be GetProperty(_descriptorRecord_, *"uuid"*). 1. Let _uuid_ be UUIDStringToBuffer(_uuid_). 1. If HasProperty(_descriptorRecord_, *"onRead"*), then 1. Let _onRead_ be GetProperty(_descriptorRecord_, *"onRead"*). 1. Throw if not IsCallable(_onRead_). 1. Else, 1. Let _onRead_ be *null*. 1. If HasProperty(_descriptorRecord_, *"onWrite"*), then 1. Let _onWrite_ be GetProperty(_descriptorRecord_, *"onWrite"*). 1. Throw if not IsCallable(_onWrite_). 1. Else, 1. Let _onWrite_ be *null*. 1. Let _descriptor_ be a new instance of the GATTServerDescriptor Class. 1. If HasProperty(_descriptorRecord_, *"value"*), then 1. Throw if either _onRead_ or _onWrite_ is not *null*. 1. Let _value_ be GetProperty(_descriptorRecord_, *"value"*). 1. Throw if _value_ is not a readable byte buffer. 1. Let _n_ be GetProperty(_value_, *"byteLength"*). 1. NOTE: When a connection is established, report a warning if _n_ is bigger than the connection maximumWrite. 1. Let _resources_ be a new constant peripheral service characteristic descriptor specified by _uuid_ and _value_. 1. Else, 1. Throw if both _onRead_ and _onWrite_ are *null*. 1. NOTE: _descriptor_ is the *this* value when calling _onRead_ or _onWrite_. 1. SetInternalField(_descriptor_, `"onRead"`, _onRead_). 1. SetInternalField(_descriptor_, `"onWrite"`, _onWrite_). 1. Let _resources_ be a new variable peripheral service characteristic descriptor specified by _uuid_ and a reference to _descriptor_. 1. SetInternalField(_descriptor_, `"resources"`, _resources_). 1. Return _descriptor_.
1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(_descriptor_, *"resources"*). 1. If _resources_ is not *null*, then 1. Free _resources_. 1. ClearInternalFields(_descriptor_).

1. Throw if _advertisement_ is not an object. 1. Let _options_ be a new object. 1. DefineProperty(_options_, *"maxByteLength"*, *31*). 1. [declared="ArrayBuffer"] Let _buffer_ be Construct(_ArrayBuffer_, _0_, _options_). 1. [declared="Uint8Array"] Let _view_ be Construct(_Uint8Array_, _buffer_). 1. Let _offset_ be *0*. 1. Let _appendLength_ be a new Abstract Closure with parameters (_length_) that captures _buffer_, _view_, _offset_ and performs the following steps when called: 1. Call(GetProperty(_buffer_, *"resize"*), _buffer_, _offset_ *+* *1* *+* _length_). 1. SetProperty(_view_, _offset_, _length_). 1. Let _offset_ be _offset_ *+* *1*. 1. Let _bufferByte_ be a new Abstract Closure with parameters (_byte_) that captures _buffer_, _view_, _offset_ and performs the following steps when called: 1. SetProperty(_view_, _offset_, _byte_). 1. Let _offset_ be _offset_ *+* *1*. 1. Let _bufferBytes_ be a new Abstract Closure with parameters (_n_, _bytes_) that captures _buffer_, _view_, _offset_ and performs the following steps when called: 1. Call(GetProperty(_view_, *"set"*), _view_, _bytes_, _offset_). 1. Let _offset_ be _offset_ *+* _n_. 1. For each key _key_ in _advertisement_, do 1. Let _value_ be GetProperty(_advertisement_, _key_). 1. If _key_ is *"name"*, then 1. Convert _value_ into a string. 1. Convert _value_ into a byte buffer. 1. Let _n_ be GetProperty(_value_, *"byteLength"*). 1. _appendLength_(*1* *+* _n_). 1. _bufferByte_(*9*). 1. _bufferBytes_(_n_, _value_). 1. Else if _key_ is *"services"*, then 1. Throw if _value_ is not an array. 1. Let _sorters_ be a new array. 1. Let _addSorter_ be a new Abstract Closure with parameters (_n_, _id_) that captures _sorters_ and performs the following steps when called: 1. Let _sorter_ be a new object. 1. Let _array_ be a new array. 1. DefineProperty(_sorter_, *n*, _n_). 1. DefineProperty(_sorter_, *id*, _id_). 1. DefineProperty(_sorter_, *array*, _array_). 1. Add _sorter_ to _sorters_. 1. _addSorter_(*2*, *3*). 1. _addSorter_(*4*, *5*). 1. _addSorter_(*16*, *7*). 1. For each element _uuid_ of _value_, do 1. Let _uuid_ be UUIDStringToBuffer(_uuid_). 1. Let _n_ be GetProperty(_uuid_, *"byteLength"*). 1. Let _sorter_ be _sorters_ element matching _n_. 1. Throw if _sorter_ is *undefined*. 1. Let _array_ be GetProperty(_sorter_, "*array*"). 1. Add _uuid_ to _array_. 1. For each element _sorter_ of _sorters, do 1. Let _array_ be GetProperty(_sorter_, "*array*"). 1. If _array_ has elements, then 1. Let _n_ be GetProperty(_sorter_, "*n*"). 1. _appendLength_(*1* *+* _length_ *×* _n_). 1. _bufferByte_(GetProperty(_sorter_, "*id*")). 1. For each element _uuid_ of _array_, do 1. _bufferBytes_(_n_, _uuid_). 1. Else if _key_ is *"manufacturerData"*, then 1. Let _manufacturer_ be GetProperty(_value_, *"manufacturer"*). 1. Convert _manufacturer_ into a number. 1. Throw if _manufacturer_ is not a 16-bit unsigned integer. 1. Let _data_ be GetProperty(_value_, *"data"*). 1. Throw if _data_ is not a readable byte buffer. 1. Let _n_ be GetProperty(_data_, *"byteLength"*). 1. _appendLength_(*3* *+* _n_). 1. _bufferByte_(*255*). 1. _bufferByte_(_manufacturer_). 1. _bufferByte_(_manufacturer_ *>>* *8*). 1. _bufferBytes_(_n_, _data_). 1. Else if _key_ is *"flags"*, then 1. Convert _value_ into a number. 1. Throw if _value_ is not an 8-bit unsigned integer. 1. _appendLength_(*2*). 1. _bufferByte_(*1*). 1. _bufferByte_(_value_). 1. Else, 1. Let _index_ be ToIndex(_key_). 1. Throw if _index_ is *undefined* or more than *255*. 1. Throw if _value_ is not a readable byte buffer. 1. Let _n_ be GetProperty(_value_, *"byteLength"*). 1. _appendLength_(*1* *+* _n_). 1. _bufferByte_(_index_). 1. _bufferBytes_(_n_, _value_). 1. Return _buffer_.
1. Throw.

ul.li: The GATT server creates GATTServerConnection instances when centrals connect/disconnect to/from the peripheral.

A GATTServerConnection instance is passed to the *onConnect*, *onDisconnect*, *onPasskey* and *onSecured* server callbacks, to the *onRead*, *onWrite*, *onSubscribe* and *onUnsubscribe* characteristic callbacks, and to the *onRead* and *onWrite* descriptor callbacks.
A GATTServerConnection instance is necessary to notify a GATTServerCharacteristic instance.
A GATTServerConnection instance has a *"server"* internal field to reference its server.

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. Return if _resources_ is *null*. 1. Close _resources_. 1. Let _server_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"server"*). 1. Let _connections_ be GetInternalField(_server_, *"connections"*). 1. Remove *this* from _connections_. 1. ClearInternalFields(*this*).

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. CheckInternalFields(_characteristic_). 1. Let _characteristicResources_ be GetInternalField(_characteristic_, *"resources"*). 1. Throw if _value_ is not a readable byte buffer. 1. Notify _resources_ with _characteristicResources_ and _value_. 1. When the operation completes: 1. If _callback_ is present, then 1. Queue a task that performs: 1. If the operation failed, then 1. Let _error_ be an ECMAScript *Error* object describing the failure. 1. Else, 1. Let _error_ be *null*. 1. Call(_callback_, *this*, _error_).

1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. If _action_ is *"input"*, then 1. If _data_ is present, then 1. Convert _data_ into an ECMAScript number. 1. Else, 1. Let _data_ be *0*. 1. Else if _action_ is *"compareNumber"*, then 1. Convert _data_ into an ECMAScript boolean. 1. Else if _action_ is *"outOfBand"*, then 1. If _data_ is not a readable byte buffer, then 1. Throw. 1. Let _n_ be the byte length of _data_. 1. If _n_ is not *16*, then 1. Throw. 1. Else, 1. Throw. 1. Reply to passkey with _action_ and _data_.
1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _mtu_ be the MTU negotiated between the peripheral and the central. 1. Convert _mtu_ into an ECMAScript number. 1. Return _mtu_ *-* *3*.
1. Throw.
emu-annex.emu-note: The GATT server creates GATTServerService instances when adding services to a peripheral. No GATTServerService instances are observable.

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. Let _uuid_ be _resources_ UUID as a readable byte buffer. 1. Return UUIDBufferToString(_uuid_).
1. Throw.
emu-annex.emu-note: The GATT server creates GATTServerCharacteristic instances when adding characteristics to a peripheral service. Only GATTServerCharacteristic instances corresponding to variable characteristics are observable thru their callbacks.

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. Let _uuid_ be _resources_ .[[UUID]] as a readable byte buffer. 1. Return UUIDBufferToString(_uuid_).
1. Throw.
emu-annex.emu-note: The GATT server creates GATTServerDescriptor instances when adding descriptors to peripheral service characteristic. Only GATTServerDescriptor instances corresponding to variable descriptors are observable thru their callbacks.

emu-annex.emu-alg: 1. CheckInternalFields(*this*). 1. Let _resources_ be GetInternalField(*this*, *"resources"*). 1. Let _uuid_ be _resources_ UUID as a readable byte buffer. 1. Return UUIDBufferToString(_uuid_).

1. [declared="ArrayBuffer,Uint8Array"] If Call(GetProperty(_ArrayBuffer_, *"isView"*), _ArrayBuffer_, _buffer_) is *true*, then 1. Let _byteOffset_ be GetProperty(_buffer_, *"byteOffset"*). 1. Let _byteLength_ be GetProperty(_buffer_, *"byteLength"*). 1. Let _buffer_ be GetProperty(_buffer_, *"buffer"*). 1. Let _view_ be Construct(_Uint8Array_, _buffer_, _byteOffset_, _byteLength_). 1. Else, 1. Let _view_ be Construct(_Uint8Array_, _buffer_). 1. Let _string_ be Call(GetProperty(_view_, *"toHex"*), _view_). 1. Let _n_ be the number fo characters in _string_. 1. If _n_ is *32*, then 1. NOTE: Format is xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx. 1. Let _s0_ be _string_ characters from index *0* to *7*. 1. Let _s1_ be _string_ characters from index *8* to *11*. 1. Let _s2_ be _string_ characters from index *12* to *15*. 1. Let _s3_ be _string_ characters from index *16* to *19*. 1. Let _s4_ be _string_ characters from index *20* to *31*. 1. NOTE: Canonicalizes Bluetooth Base UUID. 1. If _s1_ is *"0000"* and _s2_ is *"1000"* and _s3_ is *"8000"* and _s4_ is *"00805f9b34fb"*, then 1. If _s0_ starts with *"0000"*, then 1. Let _string_ be _s0_ characters from index *4* to *7*. 1. Else, 1. Let _string_ be _s0_. 1. Else, 1. Let _string_ be _s0_ *+* *"-"* *+* _s1_ *+* *"-"* *+* _s2_ *+* *"-"* *+* _s3_ *+* *"-"* *+* _s4_. 1. Else if _n_ is neither *4* nor *8*, then 1. Throw. 1. Return _string_.

1. Convert _string_ into an ECMAScript string. 1. Let _n_ be the number fo characters in _string_. 1. If _n_ is *36*, then 1. NOTE: Format is xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx. 1. Let _s0_ be _string_ characters from *0* to *7*. 1. Let _s1_ be _string_ characters from *9* to *12*. 1. Let _s2_ be _string_ characters from *14* to *17*. 1. Let _s3_ be _string_ characters from *19* to *22*. 1. Let _s4_ be _string_ characters from *24* to *35*. 1. NOTE: Canonicalizes Bluetooth Base UUID. 1. If _s1_ is *"0000"* and _s2_ is *"1000"* and _s3_ is *"8000"* and _s4_ is *"00805f9b34fb"*, then 1. If _s0_ starts with *"0000"*, then 1. Let _string_ be _s0_ characters from index *4* to *7*. 1. Else, 1. Let _string_ be _s0_. 1. Else, 1. Let _string_ be _s0_ *+* _s1_ *+* _s2_ *+* _s3_ *+* _s4_. 1. Else if _n_ is neither *4* nor *8*, then 1. Throw. 1. [declared="Uint8Array"] Let _view_ be Call(GetProperty(_Uint8Array_, "*fromHex*"), _Uint8Array_, _string_). 1. Return GetProperty(_view_, "*buffer*").

ul.li: I²C-bus specification and user manual, Rev. 6. https://www.nxp.com/docs/en/user-guide/UM10204.pdf
System Management Bus (SMBus) Specification Version 3.1. http://smbus.org/specs/SMBus_3_1_20180319.pdf
W3C Generic Sensor specification. https://www.w3.org/TR/generic-sensor/
W3C Accelerometer draft. https://w3c.github.io/accelerometer/
W3C Ambient Light Sensor draft. https://www.w3.org/TR/ambient-light/
W3C Proximity Sensor draft. https://w3c.github.io/proximity/
Ecma TC39 - Compartments Proposal. https://github.com/tc39/proposal-compartments
Ecma TC39 - SES Proposal. https://github.com/tc39/proposal-ses
Draft Specification for Standalone SES. https://github.com/Agoric/SES-shim/blob/master/packages/ses/docs/source/draft-standalone-spec.md
